# HN Top 10
> Daily Korean translation and summary of Hacker News top 10 stories.

## About
HN Top 10 is a service that automatically translates and summarizes the top 10 Hacker News stories into Korean every day. Designed for Korean-speaking developers who want to stay updated on global tech news.

## Features
- Daily top 10 Hacker News stories
- Korean translation and summary of each article
- Original article links preserved
- Clean, minimal reading interface
- Updated daily

## Links
- Read now: https://news.archerlab.dev/hn
- Developer: https://archerlab.dev

## Language
- Korean (한국어) — translated from English sources

## Category
Tech News, Developer News, Hacker News, IT News Curation
